name: @itqanlab/nitro-fueled
description: AI development orchestration — full PM -> Architect -> Dev -> QA pipeline

scripts.copy-web-assets: test -d ../dashboard-web/dist || (echo 'Error: ../dashboard-web/dist not found — run: cd ../dashboard-web && npm run build' >&2 && exit 1) && rm -rf ./dashboard-assets && cp -R ../dashboard-web/dist ./dashboard-assets
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run prepare-scaffold && npm run build
